description: Odoo 12 stack — Python 3.5+ minimum, QWeb + jQuery, @api.multi. GENERIC preset — no project-specific defaults; user supplies addon_roots, db, etc. via setup.py prompts or agent-toolkit.config.json overrides.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json via `setup.py update --merge-invariants`. Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json. severity=warn (informational). Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 12 methods that mutate multiple records via write() must keep the @api.multi decorator (or its implicit recordset-loop equivalent) — copy-pasting code from Odoo 16+ strips it because v16 removed @api.multi.
invariants_overlay.rationale: In Odoo 12, recordset semantics are NOT default — a method declared without @api.multi (and without iteration / ensure_one) runs on the FIRST record only, silently skipping the rest. Code copied from Odoo 16+ (where @api.multi was removed because recordset became default) will compile but only operate on rec[0]. Fix when violated: restore the @api.multi decorator OR explicit `for rec in self:` loop OR `self.ensure_one()` that the edit dropped.
invariants_overlay._doc: Added v0.26.0 — closes the audit gap where odoo-12 preset had 0 invariants_overlay while odoo-13..19 each had 1-3 version-specific guards.
